\tzpentry{ID3428}{Mode Frequency Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3428 introduces Mode Frequency Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\omega = \omega_0 + \Delta\omega \sin(\Omega t)$
\]
